name: United Rentals, Inc.
summary:
United Rentals (URI) reported earnings of $12.76 per share on revenue of $4.41 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $11.67 per share on revenue of $4.25 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $11.93 per share. The company beat expectations by 6.96% while revenue grew 11.84% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 revenue of $17.50 billion to $17.80 billion. The company's previous guidance was revenue of $16.90 billion to $17.40 billion, and the current consensus revenue estimate is $17.23 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

United Rentals Inc is a holding company. The Company offers equipment for rent to construction and industrial companies, manufacturers, utilities, municipalities, homeowners, government entities and other customers.
subject: United Rentals Beat Expectations

name: Southwest Airlines Co.
summary:
Southwest Airlines (LUV) reported earnings of $0.94 per share on revenue of $8.43 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.52 per share on revenue of $8.58 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.56 per share. The company beat expectations by 67.86% while revenue grew 16.40% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third quarter earnings of $0.50 to $0.75 per share and 2026 earnings of $3.25 to $4.25 per share. The current consensus estimate is earnings of $0.77 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2026 and earnings of $3.23 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Southwest Airlines Co is an operator of passenger airline that provides scheduled air transportation in the United States and international markets.
subject: Southwest Airlines Beat Expectations

name: Crown Castle International Corp.
summary:
Crown Castle International (CCI) reported earnings of $1.13 per share on revenue of $1.01 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.95 per share on revenue of $992.89 million. The company beat consensus estimates by 18.95% while revenue fell 4.91% compared to the same quarter a year ago.

The company said it continues to expect 2026 funds from operations of $4.53 to $4.65 per share. Thecurrent consensus FFO estimate is $4.54 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Crown Castle International Corp owns, operates and leases shared wireless infrastructure, including towers and other structures, such as rooftops, and other communication structures.
subject: Crown Castle International Beat Consensus Estimates

The consensus earnings estimate was $0.54 per share on revenue of $25.36 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.55 per share. The company missed expectations by 40.00% while revenue grew 25.52% on a year-over-year basis.

Tesla Motors Inc designs, develops, manufactures and sells high-performance fully electric vehicles and electric vehicle powertrain components.
subject: Tesla Missed Expectations

name: ServiceNow, Inc.
summary:
ServiceNow (NOW) reported earnings of $0.90 per share on revenue of $3.99 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.86 per share on revenue of $3.92 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.90 per share. The company reported in-line with expectations while revenue grew 24.01% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third quarter subscription revenue of $3.975 billion to $3.980 billion and now 2026 subscription revenue of $15.76 billion to $15.78 billion. The company's previous guidance was 2026 subscription revenue of $15.735 billion to $15.775 billion. The current consensus revenue estimate is $4.11 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026 and revenue of $16.18 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

ServiceNow Inc is a provider of cloud-based solutions that define, structure, manage and automate services across the enterprise. Its services include a suite of applications built on proprietary platform.
subject: ServiceNow Reported In-line with Expectations

name: International Business Machines Corp.
summary:
IBM (IBM) reported earnings of $2.93 per share on revenue of $17.16 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.93 per share on revenue of $17.59 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.93 per share. The company reported in-line with expectations while revenue grew 1.09% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 revenue of $70.24 billion to $70.91 billion. The company's previous guidance was revenue of more than $70.91 billion, and the current consensus revenue estimate is $71.37 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

International Business Machines Corp is an Information Technology (IT) company. It creates business value for clients and solves business problems through integrated solutions that leverage information technology & knowledge of business processes.
subject: IBM Reported In-line with Expectations

The consensus earnings estimate was $0.31 per share on revenue of $4.29 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.33 per share. The company beat expectations by 12.12% while revenue grew 10.76% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it continues to expect 2026 earnings of approximately $1.36 per share. The current consensus earnings estimate is $1.49 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Kinder Morgan, Inc., owns interests in an energy transportation and storage company. The Company, through its subsidiaries, owns and operates pipelines that transport natural gas, gasoline, crude oil, carbon dioxide and other products.
subject: Kinder Morgan Beat Expectations

Texas Capital Bancshares Inc is a registered bank holding company and a financial holding company. It provides commercial banking services to its customers in Texas.
subject: Texas Capital Bancshares, Inc. Beat Consensus Estimates

CSX Corporation operates as a transportation supplier. It provides rail-based transportation services including traditional rail service and the transport of intermodal containers and trailers.
subject: CSX Beat Expectations

The company beat expectations by 6.47% while revenue grew 22.82% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third quarter earnings of $2.33 to $2.57 per share on revenue of $5.65 billion to $6.15 billion. The current consensus earnings estimate is $2.08 per share on revenue of $5.43 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

Texas Instruments Inc designs and makes semiconductors that it sells to electronics designers and manufacturers. It has two segments: Analog and Embedded Processing.
subject: Texas Instruments Beat Expectations

Google Inc is a web search and online advertising company. The Company offers search, online advertising, operating systems and platforms, enterprise and hardware products.
subject: Alphabet Beat Expectations

summary:

Iridium Communications Inc offers voice and data communications services and products to businesses, U.S. and international government agencies and other customer. It provides mobile voice & data communications services via satellites.
subject: Iridium Communications Missed Consensus Estimates

The company beat expectations by 1.70% while revenue grew 0.84% on a year-over-year basis.

CME Group Inc, through its futures exchanges & clearing houses, serves the risk management & investment needs of customers. It offers products like futures & options, foreign exchange, energy, agricultural commodities, weather derivatives & real estate.
subject: CME Group Beat Expectations

name: Moody's Corporation
summary:
Moody's (MCO) reported earnings of $4.68 per share on revenue of $2.19 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $4.24 per share on revenue of $2.09 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $4.30 per share. The company beat expectations by 8.84% while revenue grew 15.12% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it continues to expect 2026 earnings of $16.50 to $17.00 per share. The current consensus earnings estimate is $16.73 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Moody' Corporation provides credit ratings, credit and economic related research, data and analytical tools, software solutions and related risk management services, quantitative credit risk measures, financial services training & certification services.
subject: Moody's Beat Expectations

name: Philip Morris International Inc
summary:
Philip Morris International (PM) reported earnings of $2.20 per share on revenue of $26.17 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.04 per share on revenue of $10.56 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.07 per share. The company beat expectations by 6.28%.

The company said it expects third-quarter earnings of $2.20 to $2.25 per share and 2026 earnings of $8.26 to $8.41 per share. The company's previous guidance was 2026 earnings of $8.36 to $8.51 per share. The current consensus estimate is earnings of $2.38 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2026, and earnings of $8.37 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

"We delivered outstanding results in the second quarter, driving net revenues to over $11 billion for the first time with excellent growth across all headline metrics," said Jacek Olczak, Group CEO PMI. "With a robust first half under our belt, including continued momentum and strong results in our smoke-free business, we are well positioned to deliver on our full-year targets while investing for future growth."

Philip Morris International, Inc. is a holding company. The Company through its subsidiaries manufactures and sells cigarettes and other tobacco products in markets outside the United States of America.
subject: Philip Morris International Beat Expectations

name: Teledyne Technologies Inc.
summary:
Teledyne Technologies (TDY) reported earnings of $6.28 per share on revenue of $1.66 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $5.78 per share on revenue of $1.56 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $5.93 per share. The company beat expectations by 5.90% while revenue grew 9.83% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects third-quarter earnings of $6.05 to $6.15 per share and 2026 earnings of $24.45 to $24.65 per share. The company's previous guidance was 2026 earnings of $23.85 to $24.15 per share. The current consensus estimate is earnings of $5.90 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2026, and earnings of $24.10 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

Teledyne Technologies Inc provides enabling technologies for industrial growth markets such as deepwater oil & gas exploration & production, oceanographic research, air & water quality environmental monitoring, & among others.
subject: Teledyne Technologies Beat Expectations

name: Travel + Leisure Co.
summary:
Travel + Leisure (TNL) reported earnings of $1.88 per share on revenue of $1.06 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $1.93 per share on revenue of $1.05 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $1.95 per share. The company missed expectations by 3.59% while revenue grew 4.42% on a year-over-year basis.

Travel + Leisure Co. is the world’s leading membership and leisure travel company, with nearly 20 travel brands across its resort, travel club, and lifestyle portfolio.
subject: Travel + Leisure Missed Expectations

name: AT&T Corp.
summary:
AT&T (T) reported earnings of $0.65 per share on revenue of $31.56 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $0.59 per share on revenue of $32.04 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $0.61 per share. The company beat expectations by 6.56% while revenue grew 2.30% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it continues to expect 2026 earnings of $2.25 to $2.35 per share. The current consensus earnings estimate is $2.32 per share for the year ending December 31, 2026.

"The accelerated growth we delivered this quarter shows our structural advantages to lead the next era of connectivity," said John Stankey, AT&T Chairman and CEO. "We are accelerating the pace of our planned share repurchases this year to approximately $10 billion, reflecting our confidence in our market position. With an industry-leading position in fiber – the best connectivity technology available – we believe our network performance and operating scale can't be matched."

AT&T Inc. is a diversified, global leader in telecommunications, media and entertainment, and technology.
subject: AT&T Beat Expectations

name: GE Vernova Inc.
summary:
GE Vernova (GEV) reported earnings of $2.47 per share on revenue of $11.10 billion for the second quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $3.17 per share on revenue of $10.77 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $3.47 per share. The company missed expectations by 28.82% while revenue grew 21.87% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects 2026 revenue of $45.50 billion to $46.50 billion. The company's previous guidance was revenue of $44.5 billion to $45.5 billion, and the current consensus revenue estimate is $45.36 billion for the year ending December 31, 2026.

“We delivered strong financial results in the second quarter as global demand for our products and solutions continues to grow. With a backlog of $176 billion, continued revenue growth and margin expansion, and significant free cash flow generation, GE Vernova’s momentum is building, and we are raising our 2026 financial guidance,” said GE Vernova CEO Scott Strazik. “We now expect to have at least 125 GW of gas equipment under contract by year-end 2026. To meet this demand, we remain on track to deliver 20 GW of annual gas turbine output in the third quarter of 2026, with 24 GW in 2028, and we are implementing actions to produce 30 GW in 2030. We are also seeing continued demand growth in Electrification, with data center orders reaching over $5 billion year-to-date, more than double our 2025 total. I am proud of how our team is executing with discipline, and I am confident there is substantial value creation ahead.”

GE Vernova is a purpose-built global energy company that includes Power, Wind, and Electrification segments and is supported by its accelerator businesses of Advanced Research, Consulting Services, and Financial Services.
subject: GE Vernova Missed Expectations

name: TE Connectivity Ltd.
summary:
TE Connectivity (TEL) reported earnings of $2.94 per share on revenue of $5.16 billion for the fiscal third quarter ended June 2026. The consensus earnings estimate was $2.85 per share on revenue of $4.95 billion. The Earnings Whisper number was $2.89 per share. The company beat expectations by 1.73% while revenue grew 13.81% on a year-over-year basis.

The company said it expects fourth quarter earnings of approximately $3.05 per share on revenue of approximately $5.25 billion. The current consensus earnings estimate is $2.96 per share on revenue of $5.09 billion for the quarter ending September 30, 2026.

TE Connectivity Ltd designs and manufactures electronic products that connect and protect the flow of power and data.
subject: TE Connectivity Beat Expectations
